name: replit
description: Create and iterate Replit web apps

interface.shortDescription: Create and iterate Replit web apps
interface.longDescription: Enables creating a brand-new web application in the user’s Replit account from a natural-language description, without exposing code directly in the chat. Also supports inspecting and explaining the current app’s behavior and applying natural-language change requests to that same app over iterative development.
defaultPrompt: Find my Replit projects and summarize the most recent activity.
Open a Replit workspace and explain the app structure.
Review Replit deployments for this project and flag issues.
